characters.demeanor: Shifts from stressed and frustrated to enthusiastic and engaged.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Uh, I have many work today and my brain... [Uh, I have many work today and my brain...]
Unknown speaker says: Okay, no worries, take your time. [Okay, no worries, take your time.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: struggling with English in a professional setting.
- Evokes empathy and frustration through a relatable grammar mistake.
- Hooks the viewer with a raw, authentic moment of vulnerability.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
TUE 14:32
Uh I have
many work today
and my brain...
Okay no worries
take your time

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: हाँ, मेरे husband ने मुझे बिना बताए record कर लिया। सच में, अपनी English की वजह से मैं रो पड़ी थी। [Yes, my husband recorded me without telling me. Honestly, I cried because of my English.] But it showed me how badly I needed to improve my English speaking skills. तो अगले ही दिन मैंने Supernova के साथ practice शुरू कर दी। Let me show you. [So the very next day I started practicing with Supernova. Let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Deepens the emotional stakes by revealing the personal embarrassment caused by poor English.
- Transitions from the problem to the proactive search for a solution.
- Introduces Supernova as the turning point in her learning journey.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: What are you doing? [What are you doing?]
Character A says: I am working. I have many work today. [I am working. I have many work today.]
Character B says: Do you mean: "I have a lot of work today"? [Do you mean: "I have a lot of work today"?]
Character A says: Yes, I have a lot of work today and my brain not working. [Yes, I have a lot of work today and my brain not working.]
Character B says: Do you mean: "my brain isn't working"? [Do you mean: "my brain isn't working"?]
Character A says: Yes, I have a lot of work and my brain isn't working. [Yes, I have a lot of work and my brain isn't working.]
Character B says: That's perfect! Well done, Anjali! [That's perfect! Well done, Anjali!]
Character A says: मुझे रोज़ English बोलनी है, but classes बहुत expensive होती हैं! [I want to speak English everyday, but classes are very expensive!]
Character B says: Why don't you speak to an AI tutor? [Why don't you speak to an AI tutor?]
Character A says: AI tutor? मुझे कोई ऐसा चाहिए जो मेरी mistakes correct कर सके। [AI tutor? I want someone who can correct my mistakes.]
Character B says: Like I did! मैं Supernova की AI tutor हूँ। Nice to meet you, Anjali! [Like I did! I am Supernova's AI tutor. Nice to meet you, Anjali!]
Character A says: You're an AI tutor? What? सच में? [You're an AI tutor? What? Really?]
Character B says: Supernova app download करो और रोज़ मुझसे बात करो। I'll help correct your mistakes! [Download the Supernova app and talk to me everyday. I'll help correct your mistakes!]
Character A says: Amazing! मैं आज से ही इसे अपने daily routine में add करूँगी। [Amazing! I'll add it to my daily routine starting today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's core value: real-time, non-judgmental AI correction.
- Addresses common objections like the high cost of human tutors and skepticism about AI.
- Ends with a strong, clear call-to-action to download and practice daily.
